name: obsidian-tracekeeper
description: Review AI-proposed wiki and memory updates before they reach your vault.

scripts.version: node ./version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json package-lock.json apps/obsidian-plugin/manifest.json apps/obsidian-plugin/package.json apps/obsidian-plugin/package-lock.json apps/obsidian-plugin/src/main.ts apps/mcp-server/src/handler.ts apps/mcp-server/scripts/smoke.mjs apps/mcp-server/package.json apps/mcp-server/package-lock.json packages/core/package.json packages/core/package-lock.json
